theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Elite Athleticism & Precision)
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: High-energy, command-center feel suitable for sports data. Dark mode is paired with strict WCAG contrast compliance and desaturated surface elevations for low-vision accessibility.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter

typography.notes: Never use Inter for headings. Keep headings tightly tracked. Use mono font for the Data Agent logs.

colors.notes: Use progressive surface lightness to signal elevation. Avoid pure black for cards to prevent halation. The contrast between text and base surface must exceed 15.8:1.

bento_rules.cards: 1px solid border-white/10, flat background, no soft shadows. Use sharp inner contrasts.

bracket_visualization.style: Technical Grid. border-collapse style. Connecting lines should be 2px solid #1E1E1E, highlighting to #007AFF when a path is hovered or a favorite team is selected.

match_card.style: Neumorphic Tactical. Background matches parent (#121212). 1px border-white/10.
match_card.visuals: Win Probability bars must be high contrast (Volt Blue vs Signal Red). xG expected goals overlay in pure white.

shap_explanation_panel.visuals: Horizontal bar chart using Recharts or raw Tailwind divs. Positive impact features in Volt Blue, negative in Signal Red. Muted axes.

audio_briefing_player.visuals: Large tap targets (min 48x48px). Floating sticky bar or dominant widget. High contrast play/pause icons (Phosphor Icons).
audio_briefing_player.features: Must include a 'Large Text Alt View' toggle that expands the brief into text-3xl for low-vision users.

data_agent_logs.visuals: Deep black background, JetBrains Mono font, text-volt-blue/80. 'Thinking' indicators with small pulsing dots.

accessibility.contrast: Strict WCAG AA. Minimum 4.5:1 for all normal text.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Use simple opacities over heavy transforms if enabled.
accessibility.aria: All interactive elements must have aria-labels. Audio player must announce state changes (Playing/Paused).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the main structural grid. Use Shadcn components for complex interactive logic (dropdowns, dialogs).
Inject the hero background image with a heavy black overlay (bg-black/80) so it provides atmosphere without destroying data legibility.
Data visualization (SHAP, Win Probabilities) must use high contrast colors: #007AFF vs #FF3B30. Avoid using color alone to convey meaning (add labels/icons).
Implement the Audio Briefing player with large UI controls and ensure keyboard navigation works perfectly. Include a toggle that inflates the brief text to 'text-3xl' for low-vision users.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based (e.g., data-testid='play-audio-button').
Install the required libraries: '@phosphor-icons/react' for icons and 'recharts' for charts.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' (weight 900) for all headings, 'DM Sans' for body text, and 'JetBrains Mono' for the Data Agent logs.
Ensure dark mode surfaces use progressive lightness (#121212 -> #1E1E1E) instead of shadows to signal elevation.
